description_long: This is a rectangular desk with a solid, flat top surface and a sturdy, boxy construction. The desk features a single cabinet on the left side with a vertical handle, suggesting storage space for documents or supplies. The right side is open, providing ample legroom for a seated user. The desk stands on four short, blocky feet, elevating it slightly above the ground. Its finish is a uniform, dark brown color, giving it a professional and understated appearance. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for work or study environments.
description: A dark brown, rectangular desk with a left-side cabinet and open right leg space, featuring a simple and functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat desktop, left cabinet with a handle, and open right leg space.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the solid side panel and the cabinet door, with the handle visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the solid back panel and both supporting legs, with no visible openings or handles.
description_view_3: Right side view showing a plain, solid side panel with no cabinet or handle.
attribute_orientation: The side with the cabinet and handle is intended to face the user, with the open space on the right for legroom and the solid back panel facing away.
